Event: Titanic Excavation - Feb 2026
Event Date: 12/02/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: A305
Brotherly Heritage

Electric Storm
A storm starts, and lasts for 4 sec. Every second for that duration, lightning strikes a random enemy unit. The target and all enemy units in a small radius around it receive magic damage equal to 20% of their max health, and the primary target is also afflicted with electric pulse for 4 sec. Every time a unit affected with electric pulse uses an ability, it is hit with a lightning discharge that deals 224000 magic damage to the target and all enemy units around it. All affected enemy units are also stunned for 1 sec. As well, the ability's primary target has its physical and magic armor reduced by 25% for 4 sec., and receives 240000 magic damage for 4 sec.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
